MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BRINK'S INCORPORATED's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for pro hac vice admission of J. David Duffy is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF BRINK'S INCORPORATED's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The unopposed motion for pro hac vice admission of Janki Patel is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling.
